'''âk-p-z''' ('''kakapaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacuumize|vacuumize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-p-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacuumize|vacuumize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âk-p-z
|-
! Lemma
| kakapaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thikapaz|thikapaz]] || [[word:jikapaz|jikapaz]] || [[word:shikapaz|shikapaz]] || [[word:kikapaz|kikapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthukapaz|thuthukapaz]] || [[word:jujukapaz|jujukapaz]] || [[word:shushukapaz|shushukapaz]] || [[word:kukukapaz|kukukapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thukapaz|thukapaz]] || [[word:jukapaz|jukapaz]] || [[word:shukapaz|shukapaz]] || [[word:kukapaz|kukapaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thukapaz|thukapaz]] || [[word:jukapaz|jukapaz]] || [[word:shukapaz|shukapaz]] || [[word:kukapaz|kukapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thekapaz|thekapaz]] || [[word:jekapaz|jekapaz]] || [[word:shekapaz|shekapaz]] || [[word:kekapaz|kekapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothokapaz|thothokapaz]] || [[word:jojokapaz|jojokapaz]] || [[word:shoshokapaz|shoshokapaz]] || [[word:kokokapaz|kokokapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thokapaz|thokapaz]] || [[word:jokapaz|jokapaz]] || [[word:shokapaz|shokapaz]] || [[word:kokapaz|kokapaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thokapaz|thokapaz]] || [[word:jokapaz|jokapaz]] || [[word:shokapaz|shokapaz]] || [[word:kokapaz|kokapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠkapaz|thĂŠkapaz]] || [[word:jĂŠkapaz|jĂŠkapaz]] || [[word:shĂŠkapaz|shĂŠkapaz]] || [[word:kĂŠkapaz|kĂŠkapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathakapaz|thathakapaz]] || [[word:jajakapaz|jajakapaz]] || [[word:shashakapaz|shashakapaz]] || [[word:kakakapaz|kakakapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thakapaz|thakapaz]] || [[word:jakapaz|jakapaz]] || [[word:shakapaz|shakapaz]] || [[word:kakapaz|kakapaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thakapaz|thakapaz]] || [[word:jakapaz|jakapaz]] || [[word:shakapaz|shakapaz]] || [[word:kakapaz|kakapaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shakapaz|shakapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshakapaz|goshakapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishakapaz|gokishakapaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shakapaznĂŒ|shakapaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaznknĂŒ|goshakapaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapaznĂŒ|gokishakapaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shakapazshĂ«|shakapazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshakapaznkshĂ«|goshakapaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishakapazshĂ«|gokishakapazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapazro|shakapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaznkro|goshakapaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapazro|gokishakapazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapazmu|shakapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaznkmu|goshakapaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapazmu|gokishakapazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shakapazsher|shakapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshakapaznksher|goshakapaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishakapazsher|gokishakapazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shakapazng|shakapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshakapaznkng|goshakapaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishakapazng|gokishakapazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shakapazya|shakapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshakapaznkya|goshakapaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishakapazya|gokishakapazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shakapazyam|shakapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshakapaznkyam|goshakapaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishakapazyam|gokishakapazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapaznĂŒshĂ«|shakapaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshakapaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishakapaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapaznĂŒro|shakapaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaznknĂŒro|goshakapaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapaznĂŒro|gokishakapaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapaznĂŒmu|shakapaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaznknĂŒmu|goshakapaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapaznĂŒmu|gokishakapaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapazshĂ«nĂŒ|shakapazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshakapaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishakapazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapazshĂ«ro|shakapazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaznkshĂ«ro|goshakapaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapazshĂ«ro|gokishakapazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapazshĂ«mu|shakapazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaznkshĂ«mu|goshakapaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapazshĂ«mu|gokishakapazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapazronĂŒ|shakapazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaznkronĂŒ|goshakapaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapazronĂŒ|gokishakapazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapazroshĂ«|shakapazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaznkroshĂ«|goshakapaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapazroshĂ«|gokishakapazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shakapazromu|shakapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshakapaznkromu|goshakapaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishakapazromu|gokishakapazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shakapazmunĂŒ|shakapazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshakapaznkmunĂŒ|goshakapaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishakapazmunĂŒ|gokishakapazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shakapazmushĂ«|shakapazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshakapaznkmushĂ«|goshakapaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishakapazmushĂ«|gokishakapazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shakapazmuro|shakapazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshakapaznkmuro|goshakapaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishakapazmuro|gokishakapazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
